series_metadata.series_description: Computer printout in two parts listing all employees by agency, employee name, social security number and other pertinent payroll information. White copy is corrected and returned to DAS/Payroll Systems. Yellow copy is retained in Agency.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: In office 2 years or until audited and report released; on-site 1 year; then destroy. ; Paper: In office 2 years or until audited and report released; on-site 1 year; then destroy., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Wastepaper
